name: Insurgency: Sandstorm
author: ops@refx.example
description: Hardcore tactical FPS. SteamCMD-installed native Linux dedicated server with selectable map and scenario.
startupDetect: Match State Changed from LoadingAssets to WaitingToStart

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd image ships no `steamcmd` on PATH; bootstrap
# it so the egg's steamcmd calls resolve (otherwise the server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 581330 validate +quit
# steamclient.so so the native Linux dedicated server registers with Steam.
mkdir -p "${HOME:-/root}/.steam/sdk32" "${HOME:-/root}/.steam/sdk64"
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so "${HOME:-/root}/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so" 2>/dev/null || true
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so "${HOME:-/root}/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so" 2>/dev/null || true
chmod +x /mnt/server/Insurgency/Binaries/Linux/InsurgencyServer-Linux-Shipping 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'Insurgency: Sandstorm install complete.'

variables.description: PvP caps at 32; co-op modes cap at 8.
